plan_brief: Detect the blue rectangular prism, estimate its top grasp pose, move to pre-grasp pose then grasp pose, close gripper to complete grasping, then retreat and return to observation pose.
program:
debug("Detecting blue rectangular prism object")
blue_rect_prism = detect_object_by_text("blue rectangular prism")
debug("Estimating top grasp pose for the blue rectangular prism")
grasp_pose = estimate_top_grasp_pose(blue_rect_prism)
debug("Building pre-grasp pose above the target object")
pregrasp_pose = build_pregrasp_pose(grasp_pose)
debug("Moving to pre-grasp pose")
move_to_pose(pregrasp_pose)
debug("Moving down to grasp pose")
move_to_pose(grasp_pose)
debug("Closing gripper to grasp the object")
close_gripper()
debug("Stabilizing the grasp")
stabilize_grasp()
debug("Retreating upward after grasping")
retreat()
debug("Returning to global observation pose")
return_to_observe_pose()
